name: Microsoft 365
description: Read mail and calendar data through dedicated, least-privilege Microsoft Graph tools.

capabilities.description: Read message metadata and search mail. No send, edit, or delete access.
Read calendar events. No create, edit, or delete access.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.search
tools.description: Search recent Microsoft 365 mail with a bounded read-only query.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.events
tools.description: Read Microsoft 365 calendar events in a bounded date range.

skills.name: microsoft-365-mail
skills.description: Safely summarize and triage Microsoft 365 mail using the dedicated read-only tool.

skills.name: microsoft-365-calendar
skills.description: Review Microsoft 365 calendar events using the dedicated read-only tool.
